name: Add/Drop Window (Demo)
description: The add/drop window is open for a limited time. Check the academic calendar for exact dates and follow the add/drop flowchart.

name: Minor Registration (Demo)
description: Minor registration guidelines have been consolidated on the website. Verify eligibility and submit required approvals before the deadline.

name: Withdrawal Requests (Demo)
description: Course withdrawal requests require advisor approval. See the withdrawal workflow for steps and timelines.

name: UGAC Website Updates (Demo)
description: We are adding curated links, team info, and procedural flowcharts. If you spot outdated info, report it to UGAC.

name: Academic Opportunities (Demo)
description: Explore research, exchange programs, and special topic courses in the Academic Opportunities section.
